text.p: I wish to use these media to write to you about the poor road we are having in our local government and their effect in some of the road like from to to you find out that there is pothole around the road and few motor due accident in that road last week there was a accident in that road between a bike man and a bicycle rider and the bicycle rider fell in of the bike man and the both crush leaving the bicycle rider half dead in the floor.

Secondly you check from to between the bridge. and in the bridce uself. For God sake how would you like to see pot hole in the brige just last month an a lorry fell in to the water there because of th the pot hole in th the bridge thirdly you find out that between and the out skate of it self. you will see many sand back which all these forces used in blocking the road it also affect the state road it also and it cause accident Just last year a car and a bike where trying to pass at the same time at the same speed and the both crush in to fences no surviver please I plead an behalf of my people for you to do something like stoping the solders from puting those sand bag on the road and also repaing of the pot holes and also enlargment of the road. I will be very grate ful if my request is granted
